name: Create Text Embedding
description: This node enables the creation of a embedding text data and output as dataframe
input: It takes in Dataframe as an input
output: Output as dataframe which have extra embedding columns

fields.name: embeddingMethod
fields.title: Embedding Method
fields.description: Select the embedding provider or framework used to generate vector representations from text.

fields.name: llmConnection
fields.title: Select Connection
fields.description: Select the configured connection required to access the chosen embedding service or model.

fields.name: chunkSize
fields.title: Chunk Size
fields.description: Maximum number of characters or tokens per text chunk used during embedding generation.

fields.name: chunkOverlap
fields.title: Chunk Overlap
fields.description: Number of overlapping characters or tokens between consecutive chunks to preserve contextual continuity.

fields.name: contentCol
fields.title: Vector Indexer
fields.description: Column containing the text content to be split and converted into embeddings.

fields.name: userQuery
fields.title: User Query
fields.description: User-provided query text for which an embedding will be generated.

fields.name: hfModelName
fields.title: Hugging Face Model
fields.description: Name of the Hugging Face embedding model to use for vector generation.
